prompt: Apply a blur to background structures based on depth.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the pink cellular structure, by applying a photorealistic depth-of-field blur effect. Use image 2 as a depth map to guide the blur intensity: regions corresponding to lighter pixel values in image 2 (representing greater distance) should receive a stronger blur, while regions corresponding to darker pixel values (representing closer proximity) should remain sharp or minimally blurred.
